fundamentals.name: MongoDB, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: MongoDB, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides general purpose database platform worldwide. The company offers MongoDB Atlas, a hosted multi-cloud database-as-a-service solution; MongoDB Enterprise Advanced, a commercial database server for enterprise customers to run in the cloud, on-premises, or in a hybrid environment; and Community Server, a free-to-download version of its database, which includes the functionality that developers need to get started with MongoDB. It offers professional services comprising consulting and training. The company was formerly known as 10gen, Inc. and changed its name to MongoDB, Inc. in August 2013. MongoDB, Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: MongoDB shows strong revenue growth and free cash flow but struggles with profitability and carries significant debt relative to equity.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 11.5%; next earnings date is 2026-08-26.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow (TTM) $463.32M — generating cash from operations.
Gross margin 71.7% — healthy gross profit on sales.
Forward P/E 42.83x — reasonable for high-growth tech, though still elevated.
negatives: Profit margin -2.9% — currently unprofitable on a net basis.
Operating margin 0.0% — barely breaking even at the operating level.
Return on equity -2.5% — negative returns for shareholders.
Debt/Equity 2.13 — high leverage relative to equity base.
Quarterly earnings growth -1.9% — recent earnings trend is negative.

news.paragraph: MongoDB (MDB) is seeing positive analyst action following a Q1 earnings beat and an upward revision to full-year guidance. Several analysts reiterated their ratings, with Barclays and Wedbush raising their price targets to $387 and $390 respectively, while Guggenheim maintained its $475 target. This news comes as the company's revenue growth remains robust, though profitability metrics are mixed.
